deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: kyverno
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: kyverno-3-8-1
      name: kyverno
      namespace: kyverno
    - template: falco-8-0-0
      name: falco
      namespace: falco
    - template: external-secrets-2-4-1
      name: external-secrets
      namespace: external-secrets
    - template: teleport-cluster-18-6-8
      name: teleport-cluster
      namespace: teleport
      values: |
        teleport-cluster:
          clusterName: teleport-cluster
    - template: cert-manager-1-20-2
      name: cert-manager
      namespace: cert-manager
      values: |
        cert-manager:
          crds:
            enabled: true
    - template: gatekeeper-3-21-1
      name: gatekeeper
      namespace: gatekeeper

contentHtml:
Secure AI Platform

A hardened security stack for organizations running AI in regulated environments. Combines policy enforcement, secrets management, runtime threat detection, and audit logging to meet SOC 2, HIPAA, and FedRAMP requirements.

Install template to k0rdent

helm upgrade --install kyverno oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=kyverno:3.8.1" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install falco oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=falco:8.0.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install external-secrets oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=external-secrets:2.4.1" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install teleport-cluster oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=teleport-cluster:18.6.8" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install cert-manager oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=cert-manager:1.20.2" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install gatekeeper oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=gatekeeper:3.21.1" \
  -n kcm-system

Verify service template

kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   kyverno-3-8-1                   true
# kcm-system   falco-8-0-0                     true
# kcm-system   external-secrets-2-4-1          true
# kcm-system   teleport-cluster-18-6-8         true
# kcm-system   cert-manager-1-20-2             true
# kcm-system   gatekeeper-3-21-1               true

Deploy service

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: kyverno
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: kyverno-3-8-1
      name: kyverno
      namespace: kyverno
    - template: falco-8-0-0
      name: falco
      namespace: falco
    - template: external-secrets-2-4-1
      name: external-secrets
      namespace: external-secrets
    - template: teleport-cluster-18-6-8
      name: teleport-cluster
      namespace: teleport
      values: |
        teleport-cluster:
          clusterName: teleport-cluster
    - template: cert-manager-1-20-2
      name: cert-manager
      namespace: cert-manager
      values: |
        cert-manager:
          crds:
            enabled: true
    - template: gatekeeper-3-21-1
      name: gatekeeper
      namespace: gatekeeper

Verify Kyverno policy enforcement

# List installed Kyverno policies
kubectl get clusterpolicy

# Test policy enforcement with a non-compliant pod
kubectl run test-pod --image=nginx --dry-run=server -o yaml

Verify Falco runtime security

# Check Falco is running and detecting events
kubectl logs -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco --tail=20

# Trigger a test alert
kubectl exec -it $(kubectl get pod -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco -n falco -o name | head -1) \
  -n falco -- falco-event-generator

Verify cert-manager certificates

# Check cert-manager is ready
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager

# Verify ClusterIssuer is available
kubectl get clusterissuer

Verify Gatekeeper admission control

# List OPA constraint templates
kubectl get constrainttemplates

# Check Gatekeeper audit results
kubectl get constraints -o wide
